name: Macro Oscillator 2
description: This algorithm is an implementation of the open source Plaits module by Émilie Gillet. This implementation should behave and sound identical to the original. Any demos or tutorials you may find online should apply just as well to this version. The user manual for the original module is available here. This version of the disting NT firmware is based on v1.2 of the Plaits code.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

parameters.name: Main gain
parameters.description: The level of the 'Main' output signal.

parameters.name: Aux gain
parameters.description: The level of the 'Aux' output signal.

parameters.name: MIDI mode
parameters.description: Controls the algorithm's response to MIDI. See below.

parameters.name: I2C mode
parameters.description: Controls the algorithm's response to I2C. See below.

parameters.name: MIDI channel
parameters.description: The MIDI channel to receive on.

parameters.name: I2C channel
parameters.description: The I2C channel to receive on.

input_ports.name: Trigger input
input_ports.description: Selects which bus is used as the trigger input.

input_ports.name: Level input
input_ports.description: Selects which bus is used as the level input.

input_ports.name: CV input
input_ports.description: Selects which bus is used as the pitch CV input.

input_ports.name: FM input
input_ports.description: Selects which bus is used as the FM input.

input_ports.name: Harmonics input
input_ports.description: Selects which bus is used as the harmonics input.

input_ports.name: Timbre input
input_ports.description: Selects which bus is used as the timbre input.

input_ports.name: Morph input
input_ports.description: Selects which bus is used as the morph input.
